app_release_notes: v0.16.9 - Load Card recipe surfaced: Generate Load Card and Save as PDF buttons on the Results screen (and right-click on any saved row in Load Library). The PDF save uses a native macOS save dialog, not the browser print dialog. Welcome tour and User Guide updated with new Load Card and Load Library steps. Results panel: the whole page now scrolls as one unit (Best Load card, workbook image, and charts together), and the first-click workbook image renders at full width. Predicted DOPE now writes to the workbook in grey italic when you click Save - the Pocket Card and Excel-side view show your dial table immediately instead of waiting for range-confirmed values. Ballistics tab no longer hides columns D/E/H/I (the side effect was hiding Bullet and Charge fields on row 5). Charts tab x-axis now shows the actual charge weights instead of blanks. Plus the in-page Print button on the Load Card HTML.
